title: BedrockCraft
description: BedrockCraft is a Minecraft mod about Bedrock and the Void.
body:
BedrockCraft is a mod about Bedrock and the void.

Youl'll need another mod that adds a way to get power (Forge Energy / FE) to get started.

The first thing to do is to craft a bedrock breaker. It is capable of breaking bedrock. Simply place it above a bedrock and provide it with much power. It'll break that bedrock and drop it above itself. You can also
place a chest on top. Then the bedrock will go there.

![](https://bytebucket.org/noeppi_noeppi/bedrockcraft/wiki/img/breaker_recipe.png)

If you want to know what you can do with that mod go to the [wiki](https://bitbucket.org/noeppi_noeppi/bedrockcraft/wiki/Home).
